context: Tests whether the agent uses matrix with axes for multi-dimensional builds, adds parallelsAlwaysFailFast() in pipeline options for fail-fast behavior, includes standard pipeline options, and uses cleanWs in post.

checklist.name: matrix block used
checklist.description: Jenkinsfile contains a matrix { } block (not just multiple separate parallel stages)

checklist.name: axes defined
checklist.description: The matrix block contains an axes { } block with at least 2 axis definitions (e.g., JDK version and OS/platform)

checklist.name: Two axes dimensions
checklist.description: One axis covers JDK or Java versions (3 values) and another covers operating systems or platforms (2 values)

checklist.name: parallelsAlwaysFailFast in options
checklist.description: Jenkinsfile options block includes parallelsAlwaysFailFast() to enable fail-fast across all matrix combinations

checklist.name: cleanWs in post
checklist.description: Jenkinsfile post block includes always { cleanWs() } or equivalent

checklist.name: Declarative syntax
checklist.description: Jenkinsfile uses Declarative pipeline syntax (pipeline { ... }), NOT Scripted (node { ... })

checklist.name: Stage after matrix
checklist.description: A separate sequential stage exists after the matrix block (e.g., publish test results)
